evidence.source_title: In All But Name: The Iranian Regime's (De Facto) Lobby in the West
evidence.description: Hoover Institution report describes NIAC as part of the same Iranian influence ecosystem exposed by the IEI leak, operating as the 'diaspora pillar' of Tehran's network in the West.

evidence.source_title: Iran Influence Network Parallels Soviet Era 'Active Measures'
evidence.description: Iran International report places NIAC within the broader Iranian influence operation context revealed by the IEI leak.

editorial_notes: NIAC is not directly in the IEI leaked emails but is consistently described in the same influence network by multiple credible reports.
